title: Real Music Discs
description: This Pack Replaces Regular Disc Music With Parodies and Remixes
body:
This Resouce pack replaces the music discs of Minecraft with songs from Minecraft Parodies and remixes of the discs themselves. I hope you enjoy this pack as this is my first post.

The Replacements: Disc 13 -> Supernatural Mobs | Cat -> Cat (Caution & Crisis Remix) | Blocks -> Blocks [A Groovy Breeze] | Chirp -> Shut up And Mine With Me | Far -> Far (PSiMetronome Remix) | Mall -> Unknown/Forgotten | Mellohi -> Don't Mine At Night | Stal -> Herobrine's Life | Strad -> Strad [Underwater Boogie] | Ward -> T.N.T | Disc 11 -> Fallen Kingdom | Wait -> Raiders | Otherside -> Otherside [Lighthouse City Remix] | Disc 5 -> Find The Pieces | Pigstep -> Pigstep [Electro Swing Remix]
